code_prompt_defaults.object_description_toggle_clean: a toggle grid with switch cells, binary cell states, and visual answer options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_toggle_notebook: a toggle grid with switch cells, binary cell states, and visual answer options
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_toggle_console: a toggle grid with switch cells, binary cell states, and visual answer options

toggle_result_label: Press the red marked switch on the start grid. A press flips that cell and its up, down, left, and right neighbors when present. Which labeled option shows the final grid?
Starting with the shown grid, apply the single red marked switch press. It flips the selected cell and its orthogonal neighbors. Which option is the result?
Use the start grid and the red marked switch. After that one press toggles its cell and edge-neighbor cells, which labeled option matches the final state?
Follow the red marked switch press. The switch flips itself plus adjacent up, down, left, and right cells. Which result option is correct?
Apply the visible red switch press to the start grid using the orthogonal-neighbor toggle rule. Which labeled result grid is produced?
toggle_repair_switch_label: Which lettered switch in the start grid should be pressed once to produce the target grid? A press flips that cell and its up, down, left, and right neighbors when present.
Choose the one lettered start-grid switch that changes the start grid into the target grid after a single press.
One labeled switch press transforms the start grid into the target grid using the orthogonal-neighbor toggle rule. Which label is it?
Compare the start and target grids. Which lettered switch, pressed once, produces the target?
A single switch press flips its cell and any edge-neighbor cells. Which labeled switch turns the start grid into the target grid?

query:toggle_result_label.answer_instruction: the label of the result-grid option produced by pressing the red marked switch
query:toggle_result_label.annotation_hint: Set annotation to one image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected result option panel.

query:toggle_repair_switch_label.answer_instruction: the label of the switch cell that transforms the start grid into the target grid
query:toggle_repair_switch_label.annotation_hint: Set annotation to one image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected switch cell.
